caption: A woman with braided hair tied in a bun and wearing black over-ear headphones is seated in a studio setting. She is wearing a black t-shirt and is positioned in profile, facing toward the left side of the scene. In front of her is a black professional microphone. To her left, a screen displays the text "Johnson" in red. Behind her is a dark wall accented by a vertical yellow stripe. On-screen graphics are present, including a logo that reads "BOSS TALK 101" with "PODCAST" written below a circular emblem. In the background, a sign reads "Employee Only." Throughout the sequence, the woman remains in a stationary position, maintaining a slight smile as she looks toward someone off-screen. There is very little movement between the frames, with only minor shifts in her facial expression and posture.
